skip_reason: Partial Phase 5 verification: cookie-auth path (Source B) verified live against x.com — `articles list` returned real Draft.js content_state JSON, confirming per-host routing, hash config, and cookie loader all work end-to-end. OAuth 2.0 PKCE for v2 endpoints (Source A, api.x.com) intentionally deferred — user opted to skip developer.x.com app setup tonight. Of 450 dogfood --live tests, 352 passed and 98 failed; the 98 failures are exclusively v2 endpoints that need OAuth which is not yet configured. Phase 5 will be re-run as phase5-acceptance after OAuth setup.
